workspace_invitations_target_check.name: workspace_invitations_target_check
workspace_invitations_target_check.value: "workspace_invitations"."invited_user_id" is not null or "workspace_invitations"."invited_email" is not null

trackable_access_grants_subject_check.name: trackable_access_grants_subject_check
trackable_access_grants_subject_check.value:
(
        "trackable_access_grants"."subject_type" = 'user'
        and "trackable_access_grants"."subject_user_id" is not null
        and "trackable_access_grants"."subject_email" is null
      ) or (
        "trackable_access_grants"."subject_type" = 'email'
        and "trackable_access_grants"."subject_user_id" is null
        and "trackable_access_grants"."subject_email" is not null
      )
